chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا جَاءَ فِي فَضْلِ الصَّوْمِ وَ الصَّائِمِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 1 – What (reports) have come regarding the merits of the Fast and the Fasting one

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/203)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/203)
text: نَوْمُ الصَّائِمِ عِبَادَةٌ وَ نَفَسُهُ تَسْبِيحٌ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Sleep of the Fasting-one is worship, and his breathing is Glorification’.
en.sarwar: 12. It is narrated, through the same chain (narrators of previous Hadith), who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that a fasting person’s sleeping is also counted as worshipping and his breathing as speaking of the glory of Allah.”
